prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-UTPSCRASIWB-LG-TN Product Type: ROTARY_TOOL Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 100pc Polish Sand Cut Rotary Accessory Set in Wooden Box Description: Ideal for just about all jobs that require precision; literally a unique tool for every job imaginable. For use with marble, concrete, brick, porcelain, ceramics, epoxy, woods, rock, glass, metal, tile, stone, & more.

Whether your project is large or small it most likely has some detail work that requires the right tool for the job. Stick to the basics with this set and you will surly be in good company. Search Terms: rotary tool rotary bits rotary tool set polish tool Features: - Universal fit for all rotary type tools including Dremel - Shank: 1/8 - Wooden travel case for easy organization and transportation === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 100-pc Rotary Accessory Set with Wooden Box

tokens.name: Rotary Accessory Set with Wooden Box

anthropic.title_differentiation: Universal Fit Dremel Compatible, 18 Inch Shank, Polish Sand Cut Bits, Wooden Travel Case

openai.title_differentiation: Universal Fit For All Rotary Tools, 18" Shank, Wooden Travel Case, Precision Detail Work, Easy Organization
